nasb.text: Gideon went up by the way of those who lived in tents on the east of Nobah and Jogbehah, and attacked the camp when the camp was unsuspecting.

esv.text: And Gideon went up by the way of the tent dwellers east of Nobah and Jogbehah and attacked the army, for the army felt secure.

cnv.text: 基甸就從挪巴和約比哈東面，順著住帳棚的人的路上去；在敵軍以為安全而不戒備的時候，擊敗了敵軍。

ccb.text: 基甸取道挪巴和约比哈东边游牧者走的路，出其不意地突袭米甸人。
